No Poverty.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course description links to poverty eradication or related targets.

Zero Hunger.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course description links to hunger, food security, or sustainable agriculture.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course description links to health, well-being, or related services.

Quality Education.reason: As a graduate law course, it provides quality tertiary education (Target 4.3) and develops professional skills for 'academic research' (Target 4.4).
evidence: 專業知識與實務運用的能力

Gender Equality.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course description links to gender equality or women's empowerment.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course description links to water, sanitation, or hygiene.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course description links to energy access or renewable energy.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course develops 'professional knowledge and practical application' (Core Competence A), contributing to skills for decent work (Target 8.5). 'Respect Copyright' also supports ethical economic practices.
evidence: 專業知識與實務運用的能力

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: Academic research, a core objective of the course, can be considered a foundational element for scientific research and technological capabilities, indirectly supporting innovation (Target 9.5).

Reduced Inequalities.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course description links to reducing inequalities within or among countries.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course description links to urban development or community sustainability.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: The explicit instruction to 'Respect Copyright' and use 'legitimate books' promotes responsible consumption of intellectual products, aligning with sustainable lifestyles (Target 12.8).
evidence: 維護智慧財產權，務必使用正版書籍

Climate Action.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course description links to climate change or environmental action.

Life Below Water.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course description links to marine ecosystems or ocean conservation.

Life on Land.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course description links to terrestrial ecosystems or biodiversity.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course directly focuses on 'German Legal Materials' and 'German court judgments,' which explicitly promotes understanding and strengthening the rule of law and effective legal institutions (Target 16.3).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course explicitly aims to develop 'global vision' and involves studying a foreign legal system, directly promoting international knowledge sharing and cooperation (Target 17.6).
evidence: Selected Reading in German Legal Materials (IV)
